# Marián Figula - Full-Stack Developer Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Marián Figula, a Full-Stack Developer from Bratislava, Slovakia.
> Site: https://marianfigula.com

## About

Marián Figula (also known as Majo Figula) is a Full-Stack Developer with 3+ years of experience, graduated from the Faculty of Electrical Engineering and Information Technology at STU Bratislava. He builds websites, internal systems, and custom digital solutions - from presentation sites to complex business applications and process automation.

## Skills

- **Programming Languages:** JavaScript, TypeScript, Kotlin, SQL, HTML, CSS
- **Frameworks & Libraries:** React, NextJS, NestJS, Spring Boot, Tailwind CSS, Node.js
- **Tools:** Git, Docker, Vite
- **Domains:** Full-Stack Development, UI/UX Design, Machine Learning, AI Integration, Process Automation

## Projects

### Professional / Real-World Projects
- **Stribog** - SaaS platform for entrepreneurs: invoices, payroll, orders, website and e-shop from one place. Full-stack including a desktop app with virtual drive file sync.
- **Instaview** - Backend infrastructure for an AI-powered HR platform automating candidate screening with hundreds of parallel AI calls in real time.
- **Everlution** - Development and maintenance of three live client projects across different industries: software for social organizations, an event discovery social network, and a winery e-shop.
- **SMSolar** - Shopify plugin showing customers whether they qualify for a government subsidy covering up to 90% of solar installation costs, using regional air quality data.

### Personal Projects
- **ScandiTrack** - Price tracker for IKEA products - enter a URL, set a price threshold, and get email notifications when the price drops.
- **Clipboard PDF Text Changer** - Executable app that automatically corrects Slovak special character encoding when copying text from PDFs.
- **TickTick Chrome Extension** - Chrome extension that automatically imports university gym sessions into the TickTick planning app via API.
